name: Project BOB
short_description: After a High_tech artificial intelligence robot named "SH" goes wild, you realize that you can't defeat him alone so you start to make a robot, helping you to stop him.
detailed_description:
After a High_tech artificial intelligence robot named "SH" goes wild, Bob is the only one left in the factory who can stop it and save humans but he realize that he can't defeat him alone so he starts to make a robot, helping Bob to stop it but it won't be easy, SH will not let it to be easy and he command every robot in the factory to stop Bob.

  • A single-player, 2D platformer
  • just run and jump, simple?! Right?!
  • 2 different places to explore and Bob's little secret room (If you find it !?!?!)
  • 80 levels with a boss fight and another mini game that you can play in Bob's secret room (Again, if you find it !?!?!?!)
  • more than 20 different traps and enemy robots with different abilities
  • some more Secrets around, wait are they still secret !!!


Project BOB is our first released game made with UNITY, which is simple but we tried to make it hard,I will warn you, in some points, it will hurt you.
but thank you for the support and hopefully we will be to satisfy our players. it will mean the world to us.
